prompt: find me some product manager jobs in Barcelona and add them to the pipeline

assertions.description: Output contains the ━━━ terminal summary block with Found/Verified/Skipped/Added counts
Every job in jobs_attempted.json with inserted=true has non-null salary_min and salary_max
Any inserted job that had no salary listed on the page has '[estimated salary]' in its notes field
All inserted jobs use status 'prospect' (not needs_apply or applied)
Inserted jobs have source set to 'find-jobs skill'
All jobs attempted have titles relevant to PM/Delivery/Program Manager — no clearly unrelated roles like Sales Engineer or Data Analyst
At least one job was successfully inserted into Supabase
